title: Use a SOCKS5 Proxy to Access the Kubernetes API — Clean up
text:
Stop the ssh port-forwarding process by pressing
CTRL+C
on the terminal where it is running.
Type
unset https_proxy
in a terminal to stop forwarding http traffic through the proxy.

OpenSSH remote login client

Was this page helpful?
Thanks for the feedback. If you have a specific, answerable question about how to use Kubernetes, ask it on
Stack Overflow
.

GitHub Repository
if you want to
report a problem
or
suggest an improvement
